tags.documentation: signalizes  the phase's activate state based on the MES input

eventScripts.script:
targetEquipBasePath = tag['parameters']['PathToTargetEquip']
	phaseNo = tag['parameters']['PhaseNo']
	#build the string to be used in the tag path logic
	phaseNoStr = "{:02}".format(phaseNo)
	#read the tag's parameter values
	if not initialChange and currentValue.value == True and previousValue.value == False:
		#phase was just activated
		#store the start time
		system.tag.writeBlocking("[.]StartTimeStamp", currentValue.timestamp)
		#assume, at phase start, that the data will be valid; write the DataIsValid to 1
		#system.tag.writeBlocking(targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/CalculationResults/Phase"+phaseNoStr+"/DataIsValid",1)
	elif not initialChange and currentValue.value == False and previousValue.value == True:
		tagPaths =[]
		values = []
		#phase was just deactivated
		#store the end time
		endTimePhase=system.date.now()
		system.tag.writeBlocking("[.]EndTimeStamp",endTimePhase)
		#read the phase's start time + the DataIsValid tag value from the MARS results area
		tagPaths+=["[.]StartTimeStamp",targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/CalculationResults/Phase"+phaseNoStr+"/DataIsValid"]
		#read the start and end timestamps for the requested phase
		values = system.tag.readBlocking(tagPaths)
		startTimePhase = values[0].value
		dataValid = values[1].value
		#verifies if the DataIsValid has the initial value since the since the batch was started
		if (dataValid == 0):
			#no disconection was detected -> mark the results as valid
			dataValid = 1
		#calculate the total phase duration
		phaseDuration = system.date.secondsBetween(startTimePhase, endTimePhase)
		#get the target equipmnet base path
		tagPaths =[]
		values = []
		#write the start and end time to the final results area
		tagPaths.append(targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/CalculationResults/Phase"+phaseNoStr+"/StartTimestamp")
		tagPaths.append(targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/CalculationResults/Phase"+phaseNoStr+"/EndTimestamp")
		tagPaths.append(targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/CalculationResults/Phase"+phaseNoStr+"/PhaseDuration")
		tagPaths.append(targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/CalculationResults/Phase"+phaseNoStr+"/DataIsValid")
		#dateFormat({[.]End_Timestamp_DateTime},"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
		values.append(system.date.format(startTimePhase,"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"))
		values.append(system.date.format(endTimePhase,"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"))
		values.append(phaseDuration)
		values.append(dataValid)
		system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPaths,values)

eventScripts.script:
phaseNo = CriticalParamLib.recipePhaseNo
	paramNo = CriticalParamLib.phaseParamNo
	targetEquipBasePath = tag['parameters']['PathToTargetEquip']
	#logic for the rising edge of the Mes RecipeReleasedForCalculation signal 
	if not initialChange and (currentValue.value==1) and (previousValue.value==0):
		#reset the recipe calculation flags
		pathList = ["[.]ActualActivePhase","[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated","[.]reqCalculation","[.]CalculatedResultsCounter","[.]NumberOfValidRequestsReceived"]
		valueList = [0,0,0,0,0]
		system.tag.writeBlocking(pathList, valueList)
		#extract the parent tag path for the current tag (.../RecipeCalculation )
		tagNameToReplace =  tagPath.split("/")[-1]
		BasePath = tagPath.replace("/"+tagNameToReplace,"")
		#loop and clear all the calculation data for each phase inside the RecipeCalculation
		#print "base path: "+BasePath 
		i=1
		while (i<=phaseNo):
			CriticalParamLib.resetPhaseCalculationAreaData(BasePath,i,paramNo)  
			i+=1
		#call the function to analyze the MES request
		reqCheckResult = CriticalParamLib.processMesRequest(targetEquipBasePath,BasePath)
		#write the verification result to the MARS handshake tags
		system.tag.writeBlocking([targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/Handshake/RequestIsValid",targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/Handshake/FeedbackOnTheRequest","[.]NumberOfValidRequestsReceived"],reqCheckResult)
		#call the script for reseting all the critical calculations results 
		CriticalParamLib.resetCriticalParamResults(targetEquipBasePath,phaseNo,paramNo)
	#logic for the falling edge of the Mes RecipeReleasedForCalculation signal 	
	if not initialChange and (currentValue.value==0) and (previousValue.value==1):
		#clear the current status of the recipe calculation
		activePhase = system.tag.readBlocking("[.]ActualActivePhase")[0].value
		activePhaseStr = "{:02}".format(activePhase)
		paths = []
		paths+=[("[.]ActualActivePhase"),"[.]reqCalculation","[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated","[.]PhaseCalculation"+activePhaseStr+"/PhaseActivatedByEquipPhase","[.]NumberOfValidRequestsReceived",]
		values = [0,0,0,0,0]
		system.tag.writeBlocking(paths, values)
		#call the script to reset all the MES calculation requests
		# !!! MUST BE COMMNETED WHEN TESTING FOR DEBUG
		CriticalParamLib.resetMesCalculationRequests(targetEquipBasePath,phaseNo)

eventScripts.script:
#detect if equipment has activated any phase number
	# !!! The phase number used here is the logical phase number (1-10) !!!
	historianName = tag['parameters']['HistorianName']
	if not initialChange:
		actualEquipPhase = currentValue.value
		#build the string to be used in the tag path logic
		activePhaseStringNo="{:02}".format(actualEquipPhase)
		#get the previous phase number value = the phase thta just ended and needs calculations
		#print "new phase detected with tag value "+str(actualEquipPhase)
		phaseNumberToBeCalculated = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated"])[0].value
		#build the string to be used in the tag path logic - PhaseNoToBeCalculated
		phaseNumberToBeCalculatedStr="{:02}".format(phaseNumberToBeCalculated)
		updateValues = 0
		pathList = ["[.]reqCalculation","[.]ActualActivePhase"]
		#read the PhaseID for ......
		if(actualEquipPhase>0):
			pathList.append("[.]PhaseCalculation"+activePhaseStringNo+"/MesPhaseID")
		#if there is an previous phase to be calculated then check the phase active state
		if (phaseNumberToBeCalculated>0):
			pathList.append("[.]PhaseCalculation"+phaseNumberToBeCalculatedStr+"/PhaseActivatedByEquipPhase")
		#read the actual valued of specific tags
		valueList = system.tag.readBlocking(pathList)
		reqCalc = valueList[0].value
		#print("reqCalc value: "+str(reqCalc))
		actualActivePhase = valueList[1].value
		#read the phase Mes ID to verify if the phase was requested by MES for calculations 
		phaseMesId = "NoPhase"
		listIdx = 0
		if(actualEquipPhase>0):
			phaseMesId = valueList[2].value
			listIdx=1
		#get the state for the previous phase (active or inactive)	
		prePhaseIsActive = 0
		if (phaseNumberToBeCalculated>0):
			prePhaseIsActive = valueList[2+listIdx].value
		finalPathList = []
		finalValueList = []
		#check if it is a valid phase number and the phase has parameter to be calculated
		if(actualEquipPhase>0):
			if((phaseNumberToBeCalculated == 0) and (phaseMesId != "NoPhase")):
				#actual phase must pe activated
				#print "new phase started"
				finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseCalculation"+activePhaseStringNo+"/PhaseActivatedByEquipPhase")
				finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated")
				finalPathList.append("[.]ActualActivePhase")
				finalValueList = [1,actualEquipPhase,actualEquipPhase]
				updateValues = 1
				
			elif(phaseNumberToBeCalculated>0):
				#check if previous phase is still marked as active 
				if(prePhaseIsActive == 1):
					print "previous phase still active-> to be calculated"
					#deactivate previous phase
					finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseCalculation"+phaseNumberToBeCalculatedStr+"/PhaseActivatedByEquipPhase")
					finalPathList.append("[.]ActualActivePhase")
					finalPathList.append("[.]reqCalculation")
					finalValueList = [0,0,1]
					updateValues = 1
				else:
					if(phaseMesId != "NoPhase"):
						print "previous phase disabled -> activate actual phase"
						#actual phase must be activated
						finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseCalculation"+activePhaseStringNo+"/PhaseActivatedByEquipPhase")
						finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated")
						finalPathList.append("[.]ActualActivePhase")
						finalValueList = [1,actualEquipPhase,actualEquipPhase]
						updateValues = 1
					#else:
						#print "this phase cannot be activated "
		#calculation request is activated	
		elif ((actualEquipPhase == -1) and (reqCalc == 1)): 
			# finalPathList: idx0  = reqCalc tag
			finalPathList.append("[.]reqCalculation")
			finalPathList.append("[.]ActualActivePhase")
			finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated")
			#reset the reqCalc value
			finalValueList = [0,0,0]
			updateValues = 1
			#call the function for parameter calculations
			#basePath = tagPath.replace("/RecipeCalculation/EquipActivePhaseNo","/")
			#get the tag's parent tag path - ..../RecipeCalculation
			basePath = '/'.join(tagPath.split('/')[:-1])
			#get the target equipmnet base path
			targetEquipBasePath = tag['parameters']['PathToTargetEquip']
			#print "call calculation  for phase no"+phaseNumberToBeCalculatedStr
			CriticalParamLib.calculatePhaseResults(basePath,phaseNumberToBeCalculatedStr,targetEquipBasePath,historianName)
		
		#phase value is zero 
		elif ((actualEquipPhase == 0) and (phaseNumberToBeCalculated>0)): 
			#print "last phase was finished"
			#check if previous phase is still marked as active 
			if(prePhaseIsActive == 1):
				#deactivate previous phase
				finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseCalculation"+phaseNumberToBeCalculatedStr+"/PhaseActivatedByEquipPhase")
				#finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated")
				finalPathList.append("[.]reqCalculation")
				#finalValueList = [0,phaseToBeCalculated,1]
				finalValueList = [0,1]
				updateValues = 1
		else:
			#print "nothing to do"
			updateValues = 0
		if (updateValues == 1):
			system.tag.writeBlocking(finalPathList,finalValueList)

targetEquipBasePath = tag['parameters']['PathToTargetEquip']
	phaseNo = tag['parameters']['PhaseNo']
	#build the string to be used in the tag path logic
	phaseNoStr = "{:02}".format(phaseNo)
	#read the tag's parameter values
	if not initialChange and currentValue.value == True and previousValue.value == False:
		#phase was just activated
		#store the start time
		system.tag.writeBlocking("[.]StartTimeStamp", currentValue.timestamp)
		#assume, at phase start, that the data will be valid; write the DataIsValid to 1
		#system.tag.writeBlocking(targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/CalculationResults/Phase"+phaseNoStr+"/DataIsValid",1)
	elif not initialChange and currentValue.value == False and previousValue.value == True:
		tagPaths =[]
		values = []
		#phase was just deactivated
		#store the end time
		endTimePhase=system.date.now()
		system.tag.writeBlocking("[.]EndTimeStamp",endTimePhase)
		#read the phase's start time + the DataIsValid tag value from the MARS results area
		tagPaths+=["[.]StartTimeStamp",targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/CalculationResults/Phase"+phaseNoStr+"/DataIsValid"]
		#read the start and end timestamps for the requested phase
		values = system.tag.readBlocking(tagPaths)
		startTimePhase = values[0].value
		dataValid = values[1].value
		#verifies if the DataIsValid has the initial value since the since the batch was started
		if (dataValid == 0):
			#no disconection was detected -> mark the results as valid
			dataValid = 1
		#calculate the total phase duration
		phaseDuration = system.date.secondsBetween(startTimePhase, endTimePhase)
		#get the target equipmnet base path
		tagPaths =[]
		values = []
		#write the start and end time to the final results area
		tagPaths.append(targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/CalculationResults/Phase"+phaseNoStr+"/StartTimestamp")
		tagPaths.append(targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/CalculationResults/Phase"+phaseNoStr+"/EndTimestamp")

		tagPaths.append(targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/CalculationResults/Phase"+phaseNoStr+"/DataIsValid")
		#dateFormat({[.]End_Timestamp_DateTime},"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss")
		values.append(system.date.format(startTimePhase,"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"))
		values.append(system.date.format(endTimePhase,"yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss"))
		values.append(phaseDuration)
		values.append(dataValid)
		system.tag.writeBlocking(tagPaths,values)

eventScripts.script:
phaseNo = CriticalParamLib.recipePhaseNo
	paramNo = CriticalParamLib.phaseParamNo
	targetEquipBasePath = tag['parameters']['PathToTargetEquip']
	#logic for the rising edge of the Mes RecipeReleasedForCalculation signal 
	if not initialChange and (currentValue.value==1) and (previousValue.value==0):
		#reset the recipe calculation flags
		pathList = ["[.]ActualActivePhase","[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated","[.]reqCalculation","[.]CalculatedResultsCounter","[.]NumberOfValidRequestsReceived"]
		valueList = [0,0,0,0,0]
		system.tag.writeBlocking(pathList, valueList)
		#extract the parent tag path for the current tag (.../RecipeCalculation )
		tagNameToReplace =  tagPath.split("/")[-1]
		BasePath = tagPath.replace("/"+tagNameToReplace,"")
		#loop and clear all the calculation data for each phase inside the RecipeCalculation
		#print "base path: "+BasePath 
		i=1
		while (i<=phaseNo):
			CriticalParamLib.resetPhaseCalculationAreaData(BasePath,i,paramNo)  
			i+=1
		#call the function to analyze the MES request
		reqCheckResult = CriticalParamLib.processMesRequest(targetEquipBasePath,BasePath)
		#write the verification result to the MARS handshake tags
		system.tag.writeBlocking([targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/Handshake/RequestIsValid",targetEquipBasePath+"/MESData/Handshake/FeedbackOnTheRequest","[.]NumberOfValidRequestsReceived"],reqCheckResult)
		#call the script for reseting all the critical calculations results 
		CriticalParamLib.resetCriticalParamResults(targetEquipBasePath,phaseNo,paramNo)
	#logic for the falling edge of the Mes RecipeReleasedForCalculation signal 	
	if not initialChange and (currentValue.value==0) and (previousValue.value==1):
		#clear the current status of the recipe calculation
		activePhase = system.tag.readBlocking("[.]ActualActivePhase")[0].value
		activePhaseStr = "{:02}".format(activePhase)
		paths = []
		paths+=[("[.]ActualActivePhase"),"[.]reqCalculation","[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated","[.]PhaseCalculation"+activePhaseStr+"/PhaseActivatedByEquipPhase","[.]NumberOfValidRequestsReceived",]
		values = [0,0,0,0,0]
		system.tag.writeBlocking(paths, values)
		#call the script to reset all the MES calculation requests
		# !!! MUST BE COMMNETED WHEN TESTING FOR DEBUG
		CriticalParamLib.resetMesCalculationRequests(targetEquipBasePath,phaseNo)

eventScripts.script:
#detect if equipment has activated any phase number
	# !!! The phase number used here is the logical phase number (1-10) !!!
	historianName = tag['parameters']['HistorianName']
	if not initialChange:
		actualEquipPhase = currentValue.value
		#build the string to be used in the tag path logic
		activePhaseStringNo="{:02}".format(actualEquipPhase)
		#get the previous phase number value = the phase thta just ended and needs calculations
		#print "new phase detected with tag value "+str(actualEquipPhase)
		phaseNumberToBeCalculated = system.tag.readBlocking(["[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated"])[0].value
		#build the string to be used in the tag path logic - PhaseNoToBeCalculated
		phaseNumberToBeCalculatedStr="{:02}".format(phaseNumberToBeCalculated)
		updateValues = 0
		pathList = ["[.]reqCalculation","[.]ActualActivePhase"]
		#read the PhaseID for ......
		if(actualEquipPhase>0):
			pathList.append("[.]PhaseCalculation"+activePhaseStringNo+"/MesPhaseID")
		#if there is an previous phase to be calculated then check the phase active state
		if (phaseNumberToBeCalculated>0):
			pathList.append("[.]PhaseCalculation"+phaseNumberToBeCalculatedStr+"/PhaseActivatedByEquipPhase")
		#read the actual valued of specific tags
		valueList = system.tag.readBlocking(pathList)
		reqCalc = valueList[0].value
		#print("reqCalc value: "+str(reqCalc))
		actualActivePhase = valueList[1].value
		#read the phase Mes ID to verify if the phase was requested by MES for calculations 
		phaseMesId = "NoPhase"
		listIdx = 0
		if(actualEquipPhase>0):
			phaseMesId = valueList[2].value
			listIdx=1
		#get the state for the previous phase (active or inactive)	
		prePhaseIsActive = 0
		if (phaseNumberToBeCalculated>0):
			prePhaseIsActive = valueList[2+listIdx].value
		finalPathList = []
		finalValueList = []
		#check if it is a valid phase number and the phase has parameter to be calculated
		if(actualEquipPhase>0):
			if((phaseNumberToBeCalculated == 0) and (phaseMesId != "NoPhase")):
				#actual phase must pe activated
				#print "new phase started"
				finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseCalculation"+activePhaseStringNo+"/PhaseActivatedByEquipPhase")
				finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated")
				finalPathList.append("[.]ActualActivePhase")
				finalValueList = [1,actualEquipPhase,actualEquipPhase]
				updateValues = 1
				
			elif(phaseNumberToBeCalculated>0):
				#check if previous phase is still marked as active 
				if(prePhaseIsActive == 1):
					print "previous phase still active-> to be calculated"
					#deactivate previous phase
					finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseCalculation"+phaseNumberToBeCalculatedStr+"/PhaseActivatedByEquipPhase")
					finalPathList.append("[.]ActualActivePhase")
					finalPathList.append("[.]reqCalculation")
					finalValueList = [0,0,1]
					updateValues = 1
				else:
					if(phaseMesId != "NoPhase"):
						print "previous phase disabled -> activate actual phase"
						#actual phase must be activated
						finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseCalculation"+activePhaseStringNo+"/PhaseActivatedByEquipPhase")
						finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated")
						finalPathList.append("[.]ActualActivePhase")
						finalValueList = [1,actualEquipPhase,actualEquipPhase]
						updateValues = 1
					#else:
						#print "this phase cannot be activated "
		#calculation request is activated	
		elif ((actualEquipPhase == -1) and (reqCalc == 1)): 
			# finalPathList: idx0  = reqCalc tag
			finalPathList.append("[.]reqCalculation")
			finalPathList.append("[.]ActualActivePhase")
			finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated")
			#reset the reqCalc value
			finalValueList = [0,0,0]
			updateValues = 1
			#call the function for parameter calculations
			#basePath = tagPath.replace("/RecipeCalculation/EquipActivePhaseNo","/")
			#get the tag's parent tag path - ..../RecipeCalculation
			basePath = '/'.join(tagPath.split('/')[:-1])
			#get the target equipmnet base path
			targetEquipBasePath = tag['parameters']['PathToTargetEquip']
			#print "call calculation  for phase no"+phaseNumberToBeCalculatedStr
			CriticalParamLib.calculatePhaseResults(basePath,phaseNumberToBeCalculatedStr,targetEquipBasePath,historianName)
		
		#phase value is zero 
		elif ((actualEquipPhase == 0) and (phaseNumberToBeCalculated>0)): 
			#print "last phase was finished"
			#check if previous phase is still marked as active 
			if(prePhaseIsActive == 1):
				#deactivate previous phase
				finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseCalculation"+phaseNumberToBeCalculatedStr+"/PhaseActivatedByEquipPhase")
				#finalPathList.append("[.]PhaseNoToBeCalculated")
				finalPathList.append("[.]reqCalculation")
				#finalValueList = [0,phaseToBeCalculated,1]
				finalValueList = [0,1]
				updateValues = 1
		else:
			#print "nothing to do"
			updateValues = 0
		if (updateValues == 1):
			system.tag.writeBlocking(finalPathList,finalValueList)
